results.description: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE ALL PERSONNEL, EQUIPMENT, SUPPLIES, FACILITIES, TOOLS, MATERIALS, SUPERVISION, AND OTHER ITEMS AND NON-PERSONAL SERVICES NECESSARY TO PERFORM THE REPAIR, STRAIGHTENING AND PITCH ADJUSTMENT OF TWO (2) 4 BLADE PROPELLERS AS DEFINED IN THIS PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT EXCEPT FOR THOSE ITEMS SPECIFIED AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY AND SERVICES. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM TO THE STANDARDS IN THIS CONTRACT.
